Meet the team behind two papers: SWE-rebench V2, a 36,000+ task open dataset for coding agents, and LK Losses, faster LLM inference. We're hiring too... https://nebius.com/events/icml-2026?utm_source=x&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=FY26_FM_NB_TRD_AWR_VA_APAC_ICML

latestPost.text: Building AI infrastructure means solving new challenges every day. The goal isn't to avoid problems—it's to solve them quickly enough to keep construction moving and key milestones on schedule. Episode 3 of Behind the Build takes you inside the coordination, decision-making, and execution required to deliver AI factories at scale. Watch Episode 3: https://youtu.be/i7nJDo2fgzc?si=xvlbTXQjIB8OYruM #BehindTheBuild #AIInfrastructure #APLD $APLD
